blended.narrative: Whitefish Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.2 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,345 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.5" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 5.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 41".
